title: Integrating NoSQL with Applications Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on integrating NoSQL databases into multi-tier applications.

questions.question: Which type of NoSQL database is best suited for complex relationships like social networks?
What is 'eventual consistency' in the context of NoSQL databases?
options: All nodes see the same data at all times
Data will eventually be consistent across all nodes after some time
Data is only consistent during a write operation

questions.question: In NoSQL data modeling, what is the process of putting related data in a single document called?
Which theorem explains the trade-offs between consistency, availability, and partition tolerance in distributed systems?
Which package would you likely use for MongoDB integration in a Node.js application?
